results.title: ‘Change is part of football’ - Arne Slot reacts to shock Liverpool sack decision in emotional open letter to Reds supporters
results.description: Arne Slot has bid a heartfelt farewell to Liverpool supporters after his two-year spell at Anfield came to an abrupt end. Despite leading the club to their 20th league title and securing Champions League qualification, the Dutchman was relieved of his duties following a fifth-place finish this season.

results.title: President Ilham Aliyev: Caspian Oil and Gas Exhibition laid the foundation for the energy development of modern Azerbaijan
President Ilham Aliyev: Caspian Oil and Gas Exhibition laid the foundation for the energy development of modern Azerbaijan
results.description: "As has already been, the Caspian Oil and Gas Exhibition laid the foundation for the energy development of modern Azerbaijan. As time passed, it transformed and became bigger and now it is called Baku Energy Week with numerous events and a lot of very good ceremonies," President Ilham Aliyev said during his speech at the official opening ceremony of the 31st Baku Energy Forum.

results.description: It’s June 2027, and you’re fresh off defending your PhD studying the direct imaging of exoplanets while starting your postdoctoral journey at NASA Jet Propulsion Laboratory. The trauma of eating ramen and living off a sub-living wage for the last five years of your life is still fresh in your brain.

results.title: Longest-period young transiting exoplanets discovered
results.description: It’s 2234, you’re on your annual class field trip touring exoplanets, and your teacher informs everyone they can pick one more exoplanetary system to explore before heading back to Earth. You and your classmates are exhausted from the day’s activities and you’re hungry.

results.title: Santa Clarita shooting outside popular recreation center leaves 1 dead, 1 critically injured
results.description: A person of interest was detained, according to the Los Angeles County Sheriff's Department.

results.title: Denny Hamlin Turns Jumped Start and Penalty at Nashville into 62nd Career NASCAR Cup Series Win
results.description: A bizarrely early start for Denny Hamlin made the NASCAR veteran fight for his second win this season.

results.title: XRP price news: Ripple-linked token hits 15-week low
results.description: XRP hit a 15-week low before stabilizing, with traders watching whether the latest washout turns into a base or another leg lower.

results.title: Street Takeovers in Southern California Decline but Remain a Safety Risk
results.description: Despite a sharp decline in street takeovers in Los Angeles County, the events continue to pose major safety risks due to high-speed donuts, near-collisions, and crowds blocking intersections.

results.title: Three People Shot in San Jose Early Sunday Morning
results.description: Three people were shot in San Jose early Sunday morning, and police are investigating the circumstances of the shooting. The incident rattled neighbors who described the area as generally safe despite the activity that often comes with downtown nightlife.

results.title: Ballots Burned, Vote Center Vandalized in Los Angeles as Election Interference Probe Launched
results.description: Election officials are investigating potential interference after mail-in ballots were burned in a drop box and a vote center was vandalized. The incidents occurred in Los Angeles and Long Beach, with authorities notifying police and vowing to protect voters. Registrar Dean Logan emphasized that any disruption will be prosecuted.

results.title: Furious Trump Makes Bonkers Excuse for Mass Exit of Federal Lawyers
Denny Hamlin Wins Cracker Barrel 400 After Late Pass on Christopher Bell
results.description: Denny Hamlin secured his 62nd NASCAR Cup Series victory at Nashville Superspeedway, overtaking teammate Christopher Bell on the final lap after a late caution reshuffled the field. Bell had appeared destined for his first win of the season before the caution, triggered by Chris Buescher's brake rotor failure, set up a three-way battle with Hamlin and Chase Briscoe. Hamlin, who started on pole but was black-flagged early for jumping the start, executed a remarkable comeback to claim the checkered flag.

results.title: Black Market Seller Charges NJ Doctor 700% Markup on Coronavirus Medical Supplies
results.description: Dr. Alexander Salerno is now a buyer on the black market. The New Jersey primary care physician typically places his regular orders through a medical supplier to refill the supplies needed for his offices spread across Essex County.

results.title: Trump Says Iran Wants Deal Despite US Strikes, Blames Critics
results.description: President Trump insists Iran is eager to negotiate a deal after US strikes on Iranian drone facilities, while accusing political opponents of undermining his efforts. The fragile ceasefire faces new strains as both sides trade fire.

results.title: Pope Leo XIV to visit Spain and France amid signs of faith revival
results.description: Pope Leo XIV is set to visit Spain and France in June and September respectively, a move that comes as the two countries are experiencing a revival of interest in faith among young people. The Pope will find traditionally Catholic countries with an abundance of historic churches but few people in the pews, but there are also signs of a revival of interest in faith among young people.

results.title: Pension rules and inheritance tax: what you need to know
results.description: Steve Webb answers a reader's question about how the new inheritance tax rules will affect their defined benefit pension.

results.title: 'Euphoria' Is Over: HBO Series Officially Ending With Season 3
results.description: Sam Levinson is closing the book on Euphoria, confirming that the Season 3 finale had served as a series finale for the drama starring Zendaya.

results.title: High-income workers seek targeted support for investment decisions
results.description: A new report has revealed that more than half of high-income workers would use targeted support to guide their investment decisions. The Financial Conduct Authority has allowed banks and financial firms to offer targeted support to customers in a bid to plug a massive advice gap. Experts suggest that high-income workers might be seeking help with financial decisions because they don't have the time to research it themselves. DIY investing platforms are also available for those who want to manage their investments themselves.

results.title: Beloved ‘Mister Rogers’ Neighborhood’ handyman Joe Negri dead just days before 100th birthday
Young Spaniards Rediscover Catholicism Amid Secularized Times
results.description: In Spain, a new wave of young adults is embracing Catholicism, marked by a surge in adult baptisms and vibrant youth movements like Hakuna, even as overall church attendance remains low.

results.title: Sui Addresses Three Network Outages With Major Upgrade
results.description: The Sui blockchain has deployed a major network upgrade to fix bugs that caused three outages and over 15 hours of downtime last week, according to the Sui Foundation.

results.title: Arne Slot's Open Letter to Liverpool Fans Following Shock Sacking
results.description: Liverpool manager Arne Slot published a heartfelt open letter to supporters after his dismissal, reflecting on the club's high expectations, recent tragedies, and his confidence that Liverpool will remain among Europe's elite despite a disappointing second season.
